title: Svelte
topic: Svelte 5 (client-side only, no SvelteKit or SSR)
notes: Book must be about Svelte 5 specifically. Client-side Svelte only — no SvelteKit, no SSR. Keep language simple and concise, not verbose; assume the reader already knows other frontend frameworks and has some Svelte background. Include zine-like, fun/exciting images and 2D animations wherever they convey a concept more clearly than prose. Requested look: light themed, few colors, yellow boxes, gray, red, blue (no existing theme id matched — build a custom light palette along these lines in book.css). Reference links: https://svelte.dev/docs/svelte/overview and https://svelte.dev/llms-full.txt (the llms-full.txt is a large reference dump — use it for accurate Svelte 5 API details, e.g. runes syntax).
